rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators and temporal recurrence patterns for stateful equations
Place component type contracts in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Generate guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
Assumptions and guarantees should reference visible identifiers from the component scope
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations: e.g., 0.0 -> pre(t) + step
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE contracts
Ensure type consistency between declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not reference opaque Boolean data ports in range comparisons without scalar representation
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables
